Video.summary: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. This fight features Masvidal’s freestyle technique and utter disregard for danger versus Wisniewski’s appetite for vengeance.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 1
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 1

Image.alt: Bodog Fight - Episode 1
Bodog Fight - Episode 1
Bodog Fight - Episode 1

Video.summary: CJ Hollett is a Brazilian Jiu Jitsu Black Belt who loves teaching his craft. He is very well respected as an MMA coach for his technical mindset, high level skills and experience coaching UFC fighters. CJ loves working with MMA fighters because of their hunger to win, and believes it's time for Jiu Jitsu to make a resurgence in the MMA cage.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - CJ Hollett
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - CJ Hollett

Day in the Life of a Coach - CJ Hollett

Enfusion 49 - Verlinden v. El Boustati

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03

UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 28 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage.
